/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -ffast-math CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/tools/test_graphd_client.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/generated_proto/query_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/generated_proto/query_service.grpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/generated_proto/meta_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/generated_proto/meta_service.grpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/generated_proto/storage_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_graphd_client.dir/generated_proto/storage_service.grpc.pb.cc.o -o test_graphd_client  -lgRPC::grpc++ /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so
